name: Dragon Citadel
description: Dragon Citadel rises above the kingdoms as one of VCMI's most expensive and powerful fortresses. Its dwellings demand a fortune and rare resources, but in return they field elite titans, ancient dragons and an army capable of breaking almost any defense.
author: Billaden

1.4.2: Raised every dwelling and dwelling upgrade construction cost by 50%.
Raised recruitment costs for every creature by 20%.
Changed English to the base language and added a complete Polish translation.
1.4.1: Added a custom Dragon Citadel creature background.
Improved the Black Monk and Storm Titan portraits.
Brightened the faction icon and adventure-map town appearance.
Unified the town's Polish descriptions, costs and visual presentation.

polish.name: Smocza Cytadela
polish.description: Smocza Cytadela wznosi się ponad królestwami jako jedna z najdroższych i najpotężniejszych twierdz VCMI. Jej siedliska wymagają fortuny oraz rzadkich surowców, lecz w zamian oddają pod rozkazy gracza elitarnych tytanów, pradawne smoki i armię zdolną przełamać niemal każdą obronę.
polish.author: Billaden
